allow: Bash(node -e "import\('./src/data/products.js'\).then\(m => { const army = m.default.find\(p => p.id==='army-defense-solutions'\); const cyber = m.default.find\(p => p.id==='defense-cybersecurity'\); console.log\('ARMY:', army.title, '|', army.features.length, 'features'\); console.log\('CYBER:', cyber.title, '|', cyber.features.length, 'features'\); console.log\('OK'\); }\).catch\(e => { console.error\(e\); process.exit\(1\); }\);")

Bash(node -e "import\('./src/data/products.js'\).then\(m => { const a = m.default.find\(p => p.id==='army-defense-solutions'\); const c = m.default.find\(p => p.id==='defense-cybersecurity'\); console.log\('ARMY title:', a.title\); console.log\('CYBER title:', c.title\); }\);")

Bash(node -e "import\('./src/data/products.js'\).then\(m => { const visible = m.default.filter\(p => !p.hidden\); const hidden = m.default.filter\(p => p.hidden\); console.log\('VISIBLE:'\); visible.forEach\(p => console.log\(' -', p.title\)\); console.log\('HIDDEN:'\); hidden.forEach\(p => console.log\(' -', p.title\)\); }\);")

Bash(node -e "import\('./src/data/products.js'\).then\(m => { const visible = m.default.filter\(p => !p.hidden\); console.log\('VISIBLE PRODUCTS:'\); visible.forEach\(p => console.log\('-', p.title, '/', p.tagline\)\); const all = JSON.stringify\(m.default\); const blocked = ['Indian Army', 'Indian Navy', 'Siachen', 'Thar Desert', 'AFNET', 'Atmanirbhar', 'MIL-STD', 'MANET', 'SIGINT', 'Indian defence', 'MoD']; blocked.forEach\(b => { const v = visible.filter\(p => JSON.stringify\(p\).includes\(b\)\); if \(v.length\) console.log\('LEAK:', b, '→', v.map\(p=>p.title\)\); }\); console.log\('DONE'\); }\);")
